# planToDO

Upload HTML plans and get a shareable URL.

## Stack
- Next.js 16 App Router, Drizzle ORM, Neon Postgres
- Better Auth (Google OAuth only) + `@better-auth/api-key` plugin
- Backblaze B2 object storage
- CLI: ptd/plantodo (npm package)

## Key files
- `web/lib/auth.ts` — Better Auth config
- `web/lib/auth-client.ts` — auth client
- `web/db/schema.ts` — Drizzle schema (6 tables)
- `web/lib/b2.ts` — B2 S3 client
- `web/app/page.tsx` — landing page + Google sign-in
- `web/app/dashboard/page.tsx` — API key management UI

## Auth flow
1. User lands on `/` → clicks "Continue with Google"
2. Google OAuth → Better Auth creates user + session
3. Redirect to `/dashboard` → user creates API keys
4. CLI uses Bearer token → `auth.api.verifyApiKey()` on plan API routes
